reviews.comment:
En esta estación no te hacen el descuento oficial que deberían hacer por pagar con la app y ser personal de salud, de todas las ypf que fui es la única que no me lo realizó, realmente deja mucho que desear.

(Translated by Google)
At this station they don't give you the official discount they should for paying with the app and being a healthcare worker; of all the YPF stations I've been to, it's the only one that didn't give it to me, it really leaves a lot to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4dHMtaV93RRAB
